language.name: English
changelog.title: What's new in PomodoroVN
changelog.subtitle: Summary of changes since the version you last saw.
tooltip.session_history:
Session history
Pomodoros and breaks completed today and on previous days.
Click for details.
tooltip.experience:
Experience (XP)
Each card review grants 1 XP (independent of Again/Hard/Good/Easy).
Accumulated from your Anki revlog for today and all-time.
Click for details.
tooltip.cards:
Cards studied
Total review answers today from the Anki revlog (not unique cards).
Click for details.
tooltip.retention:
Retention today
% of reviews answered correctly (not Again) out of total reviews.
High = strong recall; low = many cards lapsed.
Click for details.
tooltip.streak:
Daily streak
Consecutive days with at least one review (uses Anki's 'Next day starts at').
Missing a day resets the streak to 0.
Click for details.
tooltip.study_time:
Study time today
Sum of intervals between consecutive reviews in the revlog (long idle gaps are excluded).
Click for details.
experience.subtitle: Total XP and progress to the next level
experience.pomodoro_no_xp_note: Pomodoro sessions are tracked as focus history and do not affect XP.
experience.reward_rule: +{xp} XP for each unique card reviewed per Anki day
experience.neutral_note: XP is based on unique cards reviewed per Anki day. Grades, streaks, and Pomodoro sessions do not change XP.
study_time.subtitle: Time from Anki review answers
cards.subtitle: Answer events in Anki's Today window
cards.section_types_tooltip: Groups answer events by the card's state at the moment you answered it. Learning is initial study, Review is due review, Relearning is lapse recovery, and Filtered is a card studied in a filtered deck.
cards.section_buttons_tooltip: Groups answer events by the button you pressed while studying. Again means failed, Hard means difficult but correct, Good means correct, and Easy means effortless.
cards.review_tooltip: Number of answer events where the card was in review state when you answered.
cards.learning_tooltip: Number of answer events where the card was in initial learning state.
cards.relearning_tooltip: Number of answer events where the card was in relearning state. This does not mean you pressed Again.
cards.filtered_tooltip: Number of answer events for cards studied in a filtered deck, usually before they were due or under a filtered study mode.
cards.again_tooltip: Number of times you pressed Again while studying cards.
cards.hard_tooltip: Number of times you pressed Hard while studying cards.
cards.good_tooltip: Number of times you pressed Good while studying cards.
cards.easy_tooltip: Number of times you pressed Easy while studying cards.
cards.footer_empty: No reviews in Anki Today yet.
cards.help_what_body: Total number of card answers you've recorded today. Currently: {cards} answers. This counts review actions, not unique cards — answering the same card 3 times counts as 3.
cards.help_how_body:
Count rows in Anki's revlog whose day matches today's Anki day (using 'Next day starts at'). Grouped by card type at answer time:

Review ({review}) — cards you've already learned and are reviewing on schedule.
Learning ({learning}) — brand-new cards you're seeing for the first time today.
Relearning ({relearning}) — cards you pressed Again on and are re-studying.
Filtered ({filtered}) — cards answered inside a filtered/custom study deck.
cards.help_buttons_body:
Counts grouped by the button you pressed:

Again ({again}) — you forgot the card, it will come back soon.
Hard ({hard}) — you remembered but it was difficult, shorter interval.
Good ({good}) — normal recall, standard interval.
Easy ({easy}) — effortless recall, longer interval.

Correct answers (Hard + Good + Easy) total {correct}.
cards.help_note_body: This shares the Anki revlog with Streak, Retention and Study time. If you sync from AnkiMobile / AnkiWeb, opening Anki refreshes the number.
retention.subtitle: Correct answer rate in Anki's Today window
retention.footer_empty: No answer events in Anki's Today window yet.
retention.footer_stable: Retention is stable. Keep it above 90%.
retention.footer_active: Retention is based on answer events in Anki's Today window.
streak.subtitle: Study streak
streak.status_start: Study today to start a streak
settings.title: PomodoroVN Settings
time_dialog.title: Edit time
settings.accent_pick_tooltip: Click to change the accent color (timer, primary buttons)
settings.accent_reset_tooltip: Restore the default accent color for the current theme
settings.auto_start_pomodoro_after_break: Auto switch to Pomodoro after Break Time ends
audio.initial_status: Paste a YouTube link to play study audio from a URL.
audio.local_unavailable: Local audio playback is not available in this Anki build.
backup.export_tooltip: Export PomodoroVN settings and study data to a JSON backup.
backup.import_tooltip: Import a PomodoroVN backup and replace current settings and study data.
reset.study_tooltip: Clear XP, level, history, cards, retention, streak, session, and timer data. Settings are kept.
reset.all_tooltip: Clear all PomodoroVN data and restore settings to defaults.
reset.study_confirm: This will permanently clear XP, level, history, cards, retention, streak, session, and timer data. Settings are kept. Continue?
reset.all_confirm: This will permanently clear study data and restore all PomodoroVN settings to defaults. Continue?
backup.confirm_replace: Importing this file will replace current PomodoroVN settings and study data. Continue?
backup.error.invalid_json: The selected file is not valid JSON or cannot be read.
backup.error.invalid_format: The selected file is not a PomodoroVN backup.
backup.error.unsupported_version: This backup version is not supported.
backup.error.missing_sections: The backup is missing settings or state data.
